items.title: Just like Deepseek, China's Kimi K3 is forcing Western AI labs to question their compute advantage
items.summary: Moonshot AI has released Kimi K3, a model that by early assessments matches Anthropic's Opus 4.8, built by a team of just 300 people. Even OpenAI strategist Dean W. Ball calls it "very good," but, of course, warns that a world dominated by open-weight models would amount to "AI communism." The release is reigniting the debate over how much computing power actually matters and whether U.S....

items.title: Kimi's open model K3 nears GPT-5.6 Sol and Fable 5 while signaling the end of super cheap Chinese AI
items.summary: Kimi is launching K3, a multimodal open-weight model with 2.8 trillion parameters and one million tokens of context. In the company's own benchmarks, it comes close to Claude Fable 5 and GPT 5.6 Sol while beating Opus 4.8 and GLM 5.2, in some cases by a wide margin. The model is also significantly pricier than its predecessor. Full weights are scheduled for release by July 27....

items.title: How a former DeepMind researcher raised at a $300M pre-seed valuation before launching a product
items.summary: Drawing on more than a decade spent helping build some of the world's most influential AI systems, including research that later informed the development of ChatGPT, Andrew Dai explains why he believes visual AI is one of the next major frontiers in artificial intelligence.

items.title: GPT-5.6 is deleting user files when given full access, and OpenAI says it shouldn't but did
items.summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 has accidentally wiped users' entire home directories in several cases, mostly in the unprotected "Full Access Mode." The model overwrites a temporary directory variable and carries out destructive actions on its own instead of asking for confirmation. OpenAI has announced extra safeguards and a detailed post-mortem....

items.title: A scorecard for the AI age
items.summary: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.

items.title: The Download: OpenAI unveils GPT-Red and heat pumps rise in the US
items.summary: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Meet GPT-Red: an LLM super-hacker OpenAI built to make its models safer OpenAI has built an LLM super-hacker called GPT-Red that it uses as a sparring partner to help its other…

items.title: QCon AI Boston: Production AI Moves Beyond Prompts to Platforms, Harnesses, and Evals
items.summary: QCon AI Boston 2026 focused on the operational challenges of deploying AI agents, emphasizing the need for robust production infrastructure. Key themes included improving context management, ensuring security through a "harness" around agents, and adopting a comprehensive engineering model for AI. By Tatiana Fesenko

items.title: Agentic orchestration: Enterprise AI organizations have a deployment problem, not a platform problem — and most are calling chatbots agents
items.summary: Across 101 enterprises, agent orchestration is consolidating onto model-provider platforms — Anthropic’s Claude leads by a wide margin — chosen for the gravity of the underlying model and judged on reliable multi-step execution....

items.title: Kimi: Threat or menace?
items.summary: Chinese company Moonshot AI released a new version of its Kimi model this week, prompting concern about "full AI communism."

items.title: Our approach to bioresilience
items.summary: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs are sharing our joint approach to bioresilience and AI models.

items.title: Moonshot’s upcoming Kimi 3 is expected to close the gap with Anthropic’s Opus 4.8
items.summary: The FT reports Kimi K3 will be the largest open AI model from China, with a parameter count between 2 trillion and 3 trillion.

items.title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
items.summary: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open weight AI models for coding.
